title: astragalus episcopus var. episcopus
intro: Astragalus episcopus var. episcopus, also known as the Bishop's Goat's-thorn or Chinese Astragalus, is a perennial legume native to China that belongs to the genus Astragalus and family Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries, prized for its adaptogenic and anti-inflammatory properties, which contribute to its various health benefits. The medicinal properties of Astragalus episcopus var. episcopus are said to boost the immune system, reduce stress and fatigue, and improve cardiovascular health, among other benefits. Astragalus episcopus var. episcopus can be consumed as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine preparations.
